title: Legendaries SMP Plugin Resource Pack
description: A custom resource pack for Legendaries SMP
body:
Custom resource pack for the [legendaries-smp-ss4](https://modrinth.com/plugin/legendaries-smp-ss4) Plugin. If you edit the custom model data in the plugin config, make sure to also edit it in the pack. 

If you do NOT use the pack with the plugin, there will be a ton of boxes on screen. Those are the unicode characters that allow the custom cd bar to work.

Special thanks for gorpted for helping out with the textures, they are amazing.
